vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm lướt web mượt mà
vocab.example: I gravitate towards sites that offer seamless navigation, as I detest clunky layouts that hinder my search for information.

vocab.meaning: các cửa hàng trực tuyến/gian hàng số
vocab.example: I spend quite a bit of time perusing digital storefronts to keep an eye on the latest fashion trends and tech releases.

vocab.meaning: bẫy trì hoãn (những trang web gây xao nhãng)
vocab.example: While some websites are educational, social media often turns into a procrastination trap where I lose hours scrolling through mindless content.

vocab.meaning: trung tâm chia sẻ kiến thức
vocab.example: Stack Overflow is an indispensable knowledge-sharing hub for me whenever I encounter a particularly thorny coding issue.

vocab.meaning: dịch vụ dựa trên phí đăng ký (như Netflix, Spotify)
vocab.example: I frequently log into various subscription-based services to access premium content that isn't available on free platforms.

vocab.meaning: chọn lọc bảng tin (theo sở thích cá nhân)
vocab.example: I use sites like Pinterest to curate a feed of interior design inspiration that aligns with my personal aesthetic.

vocab.meaning: cập nhật theo thời gian thực
vocab.example: Financial websites are essential for me because they provide real-time updates on stock market fluctuations.

vocab.meaning: bị lấp đầy bởi quảng cáo
vocab.example: I tend to avoid ad-cluttered websites because the constant pop-ups significantly degrade the reading experience.
As a developer, I visit open-source platforms daily to contribute to projects and learn from other experts in the field.

vocab.meaning: phong cách thẩm mỹ tối giản
vocab.example: I am a huge fan of websites that embrace aesthetic minimalism, focusing purely on content without unnecessary visual noise.
